basic_details.job_title: MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: Maulana Azad National Institute of Technology Bhopal (MANIT Bhopal) Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website of MANIT Bhopal. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the MANIT Bhopal Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: M.E./M. Tech in fields related to Electrical Engineering / Power Systems / Control Systems / Electronics / Power Electronics/ Communication / Computer Engineering or related fields OR B. Tech/B.E. in relevant discipline with Minimum CGPA 7.5/10 and Valid GATE qualification.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- + HRA per month for JRF; ₹42,000/- + HRA per month for SRF

selection_process: and suitability for the project Interview performance
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of MANIT Bhopal to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
